title: Skill File Frontmatter Schema
description: Frontmatter schema for SKILL.md files in skill directories

name.description: Unique identifier for the skill, must match the directory name in lowercase kebab-case

user-invocable.description: Controls visibility in the VS Code slash command menu. When true, the skill appears in the / menu for manual invocation.

disable-model-invocation.description: Controls automatic loading. When true, the skill is only loaded via manual / slash command invocation, not by semantic matching.

argument-hint.description: Hint text displayed in the VS Code prompt picker showing expected inputs.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the skill content (e.g. MIT, CC-BY-SA-4.0). Defaults to the repository license when omitted.

maturity.description: Optional source-level maturity for this skill. When set to 'removed', the skill is excluded from every channel and skipped by collection auto-discovery, overriding any maturity declared in collection manifests.

compatibility.description: Runtime requirements or prerequisites for the skill (e.g. interpreters, CLI tools, credentials).

metadata.description: Provenance and versioning metadata for the skill.

authors.description: Author or organization responsible for the skill content.

spec_version.description: Version of the skill specification format.

framework_revision.description: Version of the upstream framework the skill is based on.

last_updated.description: Date the skill content was last updated in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

skill_based_on.description: URL of the specification or template the skill structure is based on.

content_based_on.description: URL of the upstream content the skill references are derived from.
